title: Mailchimp vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and ratings to find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
intro: Both Mailchimp and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are popular email marketing platforms offering freemium models, but they cater to different user needs. Mailchimp excels as a beginner-friendly marketing automation platform, while Sendinblue focuses on transactional email, SMS, and integrated CRM capabilities. Choose based on your primary use case and required feature set.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, A/B testing, segmentation
comparison_table.tool_b: Drag-drop editor, SMS, WhatsApp, transactional API, CRM
Transactional email, SMS campaigns, and integrated CRM

choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business just starting with email marketing
You need an intuitive drag-and-drop editor with strong automation capabilities
Landing pages and ecommerce integrations are important priorities
choose_b_if: You need multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, email) in one platform
Transactional email and API integration are critical requirements
You want a generous free tier with 100,000 subscriber limit

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. Mailchimp is superior for beginners seeking email marketing with landing pages, while Sendinblue excels for businesses needing multi-channel communication (SMS, WhatsApp) and transactional capabilities. Sendinblue also has significantly better customer satisfaction ratings.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue offers better free-tier value with 100,000 subscribers compared to Mailchimp's 500 limit, plus 300 free emails daily. For paid plans, Mailchimp starts at $13/month versus Sendinblue's $25/month, though pricing varies based on subscriber count and features needed.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow contact list exports. You can export your subscriber data from Sendinblue and import it into Mailchimp, though you may lose some advanced segmentation or custom field data depending on how you export. Plan your migration carefully to preserve important information.
